name: engram
description: Persistent memory for Claude Code — static session-start context, durable memory tools, and compatibility hooks aligned with v5. api_token is optional: set via /config UI or via ENGRAM_API_TOKEN env var in ~/.claude/settings.json (survives CC credential store races).

api_token.title: API Token
api_token.description: API authentication token for your engram server. Optional — if unset here, the plugin falls back to the ENGRAM_API_TOKEN env var (typically set in ~/.claude/settings.json). This workaround survives CC credential-store races that periodically wipe sensitive plugin values (see anthropics/claude-code#45551).
